blocks.text: Now let me run the DESeq2 analysis in R:

input.code:
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Read counts and metadata
counts <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
metadata <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)

print(paste("Counts matrix:", nrow(counts), "genes ×", ncol(counts), "cells"))
print(paste("Metadata rows:", nrow(metadata)))
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Ensure metadata order matches counts columns
metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop=FALSE]

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData=as.matrix(counts),
                               colData=metadata,
                               design=~cell_type)

print(dds)
